title: Foreign key constraint fails to prevent consistency error.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE comments (id UInt32, user_id Nullable(UInt32), content String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO comments (id, user_id, content) VALUES (1, NULL, 'This is a comment');
SELECT * FROM comments WHERE user_id IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Foreign key constraint fails to enforce data consistency
